trans-unit.source: Independent French music label. Founded in 2024 in Valleiry.
From improvised sessions to a structured label.

Kitsui is 13 when he opens his first DAW. The earliest demos are born in an improvised studio, walls covered with mattresses to deaden the sound. Cubase, Logic, FL Studio, Reaper: he tries everything.
He meets Køni, then Biggy. They spend evenings listening to beats, writing, rapping over them. Working together quickly becomes obvious.
Lockdowns turn weekend studio sessions into entire weeks. They record, mix, redo. A few outside artists start asking for mixes.
The idea of having a structure of their own takes shape. They want to keep control over their releases, artistic direction and distribution. In short: stay independent.
VCG slowly becomes a hub for artists who want to record, mix and release their projects. Biggy invests in video direction.
Official launch of VCG Recordz on January 16, 2024. Biggy as president, Kitsui in operations, Køni in business. VCG Production opens to the first beatmakers: Oddgyes, Shidozz, DMB.
The label has become a collective: artists, DJs, sound engineers, event coordinators. We keep doing what we love, at our own pace, one step at a time.
From improvised studios to a structured label — the story of VCG Recordz since 2013.
The voices and beats of the label.
French duo of rap and singing. Together, they have released over 30 tracks including 4 EPs, and recorded more than 150 songs across 8 years of activity.
MADPOOF is a Trap, Drum & Bass and new-age Breakcore producer. Already over 10 singles released.
Loupa is a French rapper known for his global perspective. He travels around the world to collaborate with artists from abroad, bringing diverse influences to his music.
Cl6ud6 is a French rapper with underground and modern influences. He has collaborated with Køni several times.
Gaxve, a producer from Spain, mainly focused on new-age Breakcore, Drum & Bass and Jungle. He collaborated with MADPOOF on "Refresh Token" and "Internal Conflict", released via Breakstation.
CXMET is a phonkwave producer who collaborated with MADPOOF on "EYES OF HEAVEN", released via Breakstation.
Meet the artists distributed by VCG Recordz · Kitsui & Køni, MADPOOF · and our collaborators Cl6ud6, Loupa, Gaxve, CXMET.
Distribution, licensing, booking, collaboration, or just to say hi · drop us a line. We respond within five business days.
Message must contain at least 10 characters.
Behind the scenes of the label, news, releases.
Contact VCG Recordz · email, phone, social networks and contact form.
Thanks, we will get back to you soon.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a site. They allow the site to remember technical information (language preference, session state).

The vcgrecordz.eu site only uses strictly necessary cookies: no analytics, no advertising, no tracking. These essential cookies are required for the site to function properly (remember your language choice, route you to the right localised version).

When you submit the contact form, the request is transmitted to Formspree, our processing subprocessor. Formspree may set its own technical cookies during this submission. Outside of this single interaction, no third-party cookies are loaded.
Under French and EU regulations, strictly necessary cookies do not require prior consent. Since we do not use analytics or advertising cookies, no consent banner is displayed.
You can disable cookies at any time in your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may affect some features, such as language switching.
Any question regarding this policy: team@vcgrecordz.eu.
How VCG Recordz uses cookies — essential only, no tracking, no advertising.
Independent music label. We distribute artists, produce beats, mix in studio and book live shows, from creation to stage.
Releases on Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube Music and all major streaming platforms.
Original beatmaking with VCG Production, several producers across varied aesthetics.
Professional recording and mixing for your projects, from singles to full albums.
Booking artists and DJ sets in France and Europe. VCG on Stage, on the best stages.
A project? An idea? Let's talk.
VCG Recordz is an independent French music label based in Valleiry — rap, trap, breakcore, drum & bass. Distribution, beatmaking, mixing, live booking.

VCG Recordz represents its own artists and producers and handles licensing on their behalf. This page details how our catalogue can be licensed for commercial, promotional or creative use. Each licence is granted on a case-by-case basis through a written agreement.

Our catalogue covers masters of tracks released by our artists as well as instrumentals produced by our in-house beatmakers. All rights in masters and compositions are held or controlled by VCG Recordz or its associated artists and producers, unless otherwise stated.

VCG Recordz distributes original recordings to streaming platforms (Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube Music, etc.) under exclusive or non-exclusive agreements with its artists. Distribution includes: metadata, ISRC codes, release coordination, royalty collection.

For any synchronisation in audiovisual works (film, series, advertising, video games, social media campaigns) a master licence and a publishing licence must be obtained in writing prior to use. We handle both sides in-house for our catalogue.

Beats from our producers are sold under four standard licence tiers: Non-Exclusive, Premium, Unlimited and Exclusive. Each tier has its own rights (streams, distribution, commercial use, stems). Beats are available on our producers' official Beatstars pages. Terms of each licence are detailed at the time of purchase.

Any track we release is expected to be either fully original or properly cleared. VCG Recordz does not authorise unlicensed use of third-party samples. Artists signing with us are responsible for clearing any sampled material in advance.

We work with a small number of artists each year: distribution, release strategy, booking, artistic direction. If you are an artist interested in joining the label, reach out via the form with a short presentation and links to your latest work.
For any licensing, sync or clearance request: team@vcgrecordz.eu, with details about the intended use, territory, duration and media. We respond within five business days.
Licensing, sync, beats and clearance policies for the VCG Recordz catalogue.
The page you are looking for does not exist — or no longer exists. Return home to explore the catalogue.
This page does not exist. Return to the VCG Recordz homepage.

VCG Recordz ("we") is an independent music label based in Valleiry. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us through this website. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act.
The data controller responsible for your personal data is VCG Recordz, based in Valleiry, Haute-Savoie. For any question, contact us at team@vcgrecordz.eu.

We only collect the data you voluntarily provide through the contact form: first name, last name, email, phone (optional) and message content. No sensitive data. No advertising tracker or third-party analytics service.

Your data is processed solely to respond to your requests (collaborations, distribution, booking, licensing, questions). Legal basis: your explicit consent (article 6.1.a GDPR), given when submitting the form.
Form data is kept for a maximum of three (3) years after the last interaction with you. After this period, your data is deleted or anonymised. You may request earlier deletion at any time.

Form submissions are processed via Formspree (Formspree Inc., USA), a GDPR-compliant subprocessor using Standard Contractual Clauses for international data transfers. We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with any other third party for marketing purposes.

Under GDPR: right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, oppose, portability and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights: team@vcgrecordz.eu. You may also lodge a complaint with the French data protection authority (CNIL, www.cnil.fr).
We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. All data is transmitted over HTTPS.
This policy may evolve. The "Last updated" date at the top of the page reflects the latest version. Material changes will be communicated on the site.
For any question regarding this policy: team@vcgrecordz.eu.
How VCG Recordz collects, uses and protects your personal data under GDPR.
Everything it takes to make music exist.
Four complementary crafts, made for artists and producers who want to move forward without compromise.
Full performance packages with artists, DJs and production, for festivals and venues.
Your releases on every major streaming and download platform.
Beatmaker network, promotion of productions and sales via Beatstars.
Hip-hop/rap recording and mixing sessions in our studios.
Full packages for festivals and venues: artists (Kitsui, Køni, Loupa), DJs (Gary, Djoolias), and the whole tech crew. From intimate clubs to major stages, we come to deliver the collective's energy.
Two formulas: pay-per-release (single or project, up to 12 releases per year) or unlimited monthly subscription. Subscribed artists become part of the VCG family and are featured on the site.

Beatmakers distribute their productions through our network, on Beatstars, free of charge. Profile featured on the VCG site, connection to our artist and producer network. Goal: build a real community.
Studio dedicated to hip-hop/rap with progressive opening to other styles. Per-session formulas, combinable with distribution for full coverage. Move to a pro studio planned.
An idea, a project, a question?
VCG Recordz services · live booking, music distribution, beatmaking and studio sessions for mixing and recording.
From intimate venues to the biggest festivals, we bring the full energy of the collective. Artists, DJs, technicians: one team on stage.
The team that runs the machine.
Behind every date, a dedicated collective: sound, light, capture, logistics, event production. No show without them.
Every stage, every festival, every crew met. The live trajectory of VCG, from the first to the latest set.
A stage. A date. We come.
Venues, festivals, private parties. Full packages available: artists, DJs, tech, lights. Send us the context, we'll get back to you.
VCG Recordz on stage · live performances, DJ sets and booking for our artists and crew across France and Europe.
Three founders. A team. A collective.

Before VCG Recordz, ten years of friendship, improvised studio sessions and the urge to make music our way. Today, the label brings together three partners, a team of producers and a live collective. No detour, no filter, independent.
Direction, music production, mixing, writing, rap, singing, client relations, web development.
Direction, mixing, writing, rap, singing, client relations.
Several beatmakers across varied aesthetics: trap, drum & bass, breakcore, phonk. Available on Beatstars for all your projects.
Non-exclusive and exclusive licences available for your projects.
VCG is also a growing collective delivering live shows across France and Europe. Artists, DJs, technicians: one same artistic direction, one same energy.
The VCG Recordz team · Kitsui, Biggy, Køni · and the VCG Production beatmakers: Oddgyes, Shidozz, DMB, NVSDV, No$$if.
These terms govern access to and use of the vcgrecordz.eu website. By browsing this site you accept these terms in full. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.
The site is published by VCG Recordz, an independent music label based in Valleiry, Haute-Savoie. Contact: team@vcgrecordz.eu. Hosting is provided by a compliant web host.

All content on this site (texts, graphics, logos, photographs, visuals, music excerpts, beats, audiovisual content) is the property of VCG Recordz, its artists, producers or licensors, and is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, representation, distribution or commercial use without prior written authorisation is prohibited.

You agree not to damage the site, render it inaccessible or impair its operation, nor attempt unauthorised access to any part of it, its servers or related systems. Any scraping, mirroring or systematic downloading attempt is prohibited.

The site links to third-party platforms (Spotify, YouTube, Instagram, SoundCloud, Beatstars, Formspree, etc.). VCG Recordz has no control over these platforms and declines all responsibility for their content, availability or practices.

The site is provided "as is" and accessed at your own risk. VCG Recordz makes its best efforts to ensure the accuracy of information, without guaranteeing completeness or absence of errors. We decline all liability for indirect damages arising from use of the site.
Processing of personal data is governed by our privacy policy, which forms an integral part of these terms.
These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent French courts, after attempt at amicable resolution.
Any question regarding these terms: team@vcgrecordz.eu.
Terms of use of the VCG Recordz website, intellectual property, liability and governing law.
